name: Advance
instructions: You may trash an Action card from your hand. If you do, gain an Action card costing up to $6.

name: Annex
instructions: Look through your discard pile. Shuffle all but up to 5 cards from it into your deck. Gain a Duchy.

name: Aqueduct
instructions:
When you gain a Treasure, move 1 VP from its pile to this. When you gain a Victory card, take the VP from this.
-----
Setup: Put 8 VP on the Silver and Gold piles.

name: Archive
instructions:
+1 Action
Set aside the top 3 cards of your deck face down (you may look at them). Now and at the start of your next two turns, put one into your hand.

name: Arena
instructions:
At the start of your Buy phase, you may discard an Action card. If you do, take 2 VP from here.
-----
Setup: Put 6 VP here per player.

name: Bandit Fort
instructions: When scoring, -2 VP for each Silver and each Gold you have.

name: Banquet
instructions: Gain 2 Coppers and a non-Victory card costing up to $5.

name: Basilica
instructions:
When you gain a card in your Buy phase, if you have $2 or more, take 2 VP from here.
-----
Setup: Put 6 VP here per player.

name: Baths
instructions:
When you end your turn without having gained a card, take 2 VP from here.
-----
Setup: Put 6 VP here per player.

name: Battlefield
instructions:
When you gain a Victory card, take 2 VP from here.
-----
Setup: Put 6 VP here per player.

name: Bustling Village
instructions:
+1 Card
+3 Actions
You may reveal a Settlers from your discard pile and put it into your hand.

name: Capital
instructions:
$6
+1 Buy
-----
When you discard this from play, +6D.

name: Castles
instructions: Setup: Sort the Castle pile by cost, putting the more expensive Castles on the bottom. For a 2-player game, use only one of each Castle. Only the top card of the pile can be gained or bought.

name: Catapult
instructions:
+$1
Trash a card from your hand. If it costs $3 or more, each other player gains a Curse. If it's a Treasure, each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.

name: Catapult/Rocks
instructions: Setup: This pile starts the game with 5 copies of Catapult on top, then 5 copies of Rocks. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

name: Chariot Race
instructions:
+1 Action
+1 Card, revealing it. The player to your left reveals the top card of their deck. If your card costs more, +$1 and +1 VP.

name: Charm
instructions: Choose one: +1 Buy and +$2; or the next time you gain a card this turn, you may also gain a differently named card with the same cost.

name: City Quarter
instructions:
+2 Actions
Reveal your hand. +1 Card per Action card revealed.

name: Colonnade
instructions:
When you gain an Action card in your Buy phase, if you have a copy of it in play, take 2 VP from here.
-----
Setup: Put 6 VP here per player.

name: Conquest
instructions: Gain 2 Silvers. +1 VP per Silver you've gained this turn.

name: Crown
instructions:
If it's your Action phase, you may play an Action from your hand twice.
If it's your Buy phase, you may play a Treasure from your hand twice.

name: Crumbling Castle
instructions:
1 VP
-----
When you gain or trash this, +1 VP and gain a Silver.

name: Defiled Shrine
instructions:
When you gain an Action, move 1 VP from its pile to this. When you gain a Curse in your Buy phase, take the VP from this.
-----
Setup: Put 2 VP on each non-Gathering Action Supply pile.

name: Delve
instructions:
+1 Buy
Gain a Silver.

name: Dominate
instructions: Gain a Province. If you do, +9 VP.

name: Donate
instructions: At the start of your next turn, first, put your deck and discard pile into your hand, trash any number of cards from it, then shuffle the rest into your deck and draw 5 cards.

name: Emporium
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
+$1
-----
When you gain this, if you have at least 5 Action cards in play, +2 VP.

name: Encampment
instructions:
+2 Cards
+2 Actions
You may reveal a Gold or Plunder from your hand. If you do not, set this aside, and return it to its pile at the start of Clean-up.

name: Encampment/Plunder
instructions: Setup: This pile starts the game with 5 copies of Encampment on top, then 5 copies of Plunder. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

name: Enchantress
instructions:
Until your next turn, the first time each other player plays an Action card on their turn, they get +1 Card and +1 Action instead of following its instructions.
At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards

name: Engineer
instructions: Gain a card costing up to $4. You may trash this. If you do, gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Farmers' Market
instructions:
+1 Buy
If there are 4 VP or more on the Farmers' Market pile, take them and trash this. Otherwise, add 1 VP to the pile and then +$1 per 1 VP on the pile.

name: Fortune
instructions:
+1 Buy
Double your $ if you haven't yet this turn.
-----
When you gain this, gain a Gold per Gladiator you have in play.

name: Forum
instructions:
+3 Cards
+1 Action
Discard 2 cards.
-----
When you gain this, +1 Buy.

name: Fountain
instructions: When scoring, 15 VP if you have at least 10 Coppers.

name: Gladiator
instructions:
+$2
Reveal a card from your hand. The player to your left may reveal a copy from their hand. If they don't, +$1 and trash a Gladiator from its pile.

name: Gladiator/Fortune
instructions: Setup: This pile starts the game with 5 copies of Gladiator on top, then 5 copies of Fortune. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

name: Grand Castle
instructions:
5 VP
-----
When you gain this, reveal your hand. +1 VP per Victory card in your hand and/or in play.

name: Groundskeeper
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
This turn, when you gain a Victory card, +1 VP.

name: Haunted Castle
instructions:
2 VP
-----
When you gain this during your turn, gain a Gold, and each other player with 5 or more cards in hand puts 2 of them onto their deck.

name: Humble Castle
instructions:
$1
-----
Worth 1 VP per Castle you have.

name: Keep
instructions: When scoring, 5 VP per differently named Treasure you have, that you have more copies of than each other player, or tied for most.

name: King's Castle
instructions: Worth 2 VP per Castle you have.

name: Labyrinth
instructions:
When you gain a 2nd card in one of your turns, take 2 VP from here.
-----
Setup: Put 6 VP here per player.

name: Legionary
instructions:
+$3
You may reveal a Gold from your hand. If you do, each other player discards down to 2 cards in hand, then draws a card.

name: Mountain Pass
instructions: When you are the first player to gain a Province, each player bids once, up to 40D, ending with you. High bidder gets +8 VP and takes the D they bid.

name: Museum
instructions: When scoring, 2 VP per differently named card you have.

name: Obelisk
instructions:
When scoring, 2 VP per card you have from the chosen pile.
-----
Setup: Choose a random Action Supply pile.

name: Opulent Castle
instructions:
Discard any number of Victory cards, revealed. +$2 per card discarded.
-----
3 VP

name: Orchard
instructions: When scoring, 4 VP per differently named Action card you have 3 or more copies of.

name: Overlord
instructions: Play a non-Command non-Duration Action card from the Supply costing up to $5, leaving it there.

name: Palace
instructions: When scoring, 3 VP per set you have of Copper - Silver - Gold.

name: Patrician
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs $5 or more, put it into your hand.

name: Patrician/Emporium
instructions: Setup: This pile starts the game with 5 copies of Patrician on top, then 5 copies of Emporium. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

name: Ritual
instructions: Gain a Curse. If you do, trash a card from your hand. +1 VP per $1 it costs.

name: Rocks
instructions:
$1
-----
When you gain or trash this: If it's your Buy phase, gain a Silver onto your deck, otherwise gain a Silver to your hand.

name: Royal Blacksmith
instructions:
+5 Cards
Reveal your hand; discard the Coppers.

name: Sacrifice
instructions:
Trash a card from your hand. If it's an...
Action card, +2 Cards and +2 Actions
Treasure card, +$2
Victory card, +2 VP

name: Salt the Earth
instructions:
+1 VP
Trash a Victory card from the Supply.

name: Settlers
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
You may reveal a Copper from your discard pile and put it into your hand.

name: Settlers/Bustling Village
instructions: Setup: This pile starts the game with 5 copies of Settlers on top, then 5 copies of Bustling Village. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

name: Small Castle
instructions:
Trash this or a Castle from your hand. If you do, gain a Castle.
-----
2 VP

name: Sprawling Castle
instructions:
4 VP
-----
When you gain this, gain a Duchy or 3 Estates.

name: Tax
instructions:
Add 2D to a Supply pile.
-----
Setup: Add 1D to each Supply pile. When a player gains a card in their Buy phase, they take the D from its pile.

name: Temple
instructions:
+1 VP
Trash from 1 to 3 differently named cards from your hand. Add 1 VP to the Temple pile.
-----
When you gain this, take the VP from the Temple pile.

name: Tomb
instructions: When you trash a card, +1 VP.

name: Tower
instructions: When scoring, 1 VP per non-Victory card you have from an empty Supply pile.

name: Triumph
instructions: Gain an Estate. If you did, +1 VP per card you've gained this turn.

name: Triumphal Arch
instructions: When scoring, 3 VP per copy you have of the 2nd most common Action card among your cards (if it's a tie, count either).

name: Villa
instructions:
+2 Actions
+1 Buy
+$1
-----
When you gain this, put it into your hand, +1 Action, and if it's your Buy phase return to your Action phase.

name: Wall
instructions: When scoring, -1 VP per card you have after the first 15.

name: Wedding
instructions:
+1 VP
Gain a Gold.

name: Wild Hunt
instructions: Choose one: +3 Cards and add 1 VP to the Wild Hunt pile; or gain an Estate, and if you do, take the VP from the pile.

name: Windfall
instructions: If your deck and discard pile are empty, gain 3 Golds.

name: Wolf Den
instructions: When scoring, -3 VP per card you have exactly one copy of.
